scores.correctness_notes: All three parameters correctly described with accurate types, defaults, and behaviour. The combine=True description is accurate and matches gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor inaccuracy: states 'replaces any existing layer with the same label' when combine=False, but the gold standard says combine=False requires the label to be unique (i.e. it would error if label already exists, not replace it). This is a subtle but real factual error about the default behaviour.
